flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St Olaf College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.7k → $59.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at St Olaf College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.7k → $59.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at St Olaf College rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.0k → $26.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St Olaf College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
